verses.text: Babylon gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Leitaw lam panin pingpei hong kipat mah bangin, a lauhuai gam panin siatna hong pai hi

A kihtakhuai maangmuhna khat kei tungah hong kigen hi. A sutzo mipa in sut a, a susiazo mipa in susia hi. Elam galkapte aw, kuanto un. Media galkapte aw, umcih un. Babylon' pian'sak khuisatnate khempeuh Pasian in beisak ta hi
Tua ahih ciangin ka kawng na a, nausuak numei in na a sak bangin na ka sa hi. Khua a za theilo zah dongin a kuncipin ka om a, khua a mu theilo zah dongin lungkia-in ka om hi
Ka lung vai a, launa in hong sidaangsak hi. Keima lunggulh zan khuamial pen keima lin'na a suak hi
Amaute in sabuai phahin, sualpuante phah uh a, an ne-in tui dawn uh hi. Uliante aw, tho un; lum, sathau nuh un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah: “Pai in; galvil khat koih in la, ama muh bangbang gensak in
Amah in a kopkopin sakol tung tuang mite, la tunga a tuangte, kalaoh tunga a tuangte a muh ciangin limtak, phatakin encik hen,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin a mupa kiko a, “Topa aw, tausang tungah sun tawntung ka ding a, ka vilna munah zan khuavak ka om hi
En in, sakol tung tuangte a kopkopin hong pai!” a ci hi. Adang khat in, “Babylon cim hi, cim hi. A milim pasian-te khempeuh leilak dongah amah in suksiatsak hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
A kicilsa, a kiseepsa keima mite aw, Israel-te' Pasian, Vanglian Topa' tung panin ka zaksa thu teng note tungah ka hong gen hi.
Edom gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Seir mual tung panin khat in kei hong sam a, “Galvilpa aw, tuzan bangci hiam? Galvilpa aw, tuzan bangci hiam?” hong ci hi
Galvilpa keimah in, “Zing ni hong suak a, zan khua zong hong mial hi. Thukan nuam na hih leh hong paikik in la hong kan in,” ka ci hi.
Arabia gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Dedan mi khualzin honte aw, Arabia gamlakah na giak ding uh hi
Tema gama teng mite aw, a dangtakte tui puak un la, galtaite an tawh dawn un
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, namsau, a kidoksa namsau, a kiseek thal leh gal in a phutna panin a hong tai uh ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in keima tungah, “Thacial kum hunte mah bangin kum khat sungin Kedar mite' minthan'na khempeuh bei ding hi
Kedar mi thaltawi siam a omlaite tawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, Israel Pasian in hih thu gen khinzo hi,” hong ci hi.
